product_overview: A Laravel-based recipe blog focused on high-quality SEO, Amazon affiliate monetization, and AI-assisted content management to publish and manage recipes, books, and static pages.
core_goals: Serve fast, SEO-optimized recipe content with Schema.org JSON-LD for better search results
Monetize via Amazon Associates links with country-aware routing
Provide a robust admin panel for creating, publishing and managing recipes, books and pages
Offer AI-assisted recipe enhancement with rate limiting and diff/accept workflow
Enable bulk CSV imports with safe batching and progress monitoring
Maintain performance via 24h page caching and non-blocking view counting

features.name: Homepage
features.description: Public homepage showing featured recipes, latest recipes, quick recipes, categories and a random featured Amazon book widget.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See hero with featured recipes
Navigate to / -> See latest recipes grid
Navigate to / -> Click a featured recipe card -> Navigate to /{slug}
Navigate to / -> See random featured Amazon book widget -> Click book CTA -> Navigate to /tienda/{book}
Navigate to / -> Page fails to load due to server error -> See error page or 500 response

features.name: Recipe Listing
features.description: Paginated list of published recipes with filtering by category, tag, difficulty and time and sorting options.
user_flows: Navigate to /recetas -> See first page of published recipes
Navigate to /recetas -> Click a category filter -> See filtered results
Navigate to /recetas -> Apply time filter (≤30 min) -> See filtered results preserved across pagination
Navigate to /recetas?page=5&category=salads -> Click pagination link -> Remain with active filters preserved
Navigate to /recetas -> Attempt to view unpublished recipe from listing -> Unpublished recipe not shown

features.name: Recipe Detail
features.description: Full recipe page with featured image, meta bar, ingredients with checkbox persistence, serving adjuster, step timers, FAQ accordion, related recipes and Schema.org JSON-LD.
user_flows: Navegar a /{slug} -> Ver meta (tiempo, porciones) -> Ver lista de ingredientes -> Ver pasos de preparación -> Ver JSON-LD Recipe script
Navegar a /{slug} -> Adjust servings control -> See ingredient amounts update (fractions shown)
Navegar a /{slug} -> Click ingredient checkbox -> Reload page -> See checkbox state persisted via localStorage
Navegar a /{slug} -> Click step timer start -> See timer running for step duration
Navegar a /{slug} for unpublished recipe -> See 404 page

features.name: Category & Subcategory Pages
features.description: Category hub pages showing subcategories, breadcrumb navigation and lists of published recipes; subcategory pages show recipes within a subcategory.
user_flows: Navigate to /recetas/{category} -> See category hub with subcategories and recipes
Navigate to /recetas/{category}/{subcategory} -> See subcategory recipe listing and breadcrumb
Navigate to /recetas/{category} -> Click a subcategory -> Navigate to /recetas/{category}/{subcategory}
Navigate to /recetas/{invalid-category} -> See 404 page

features.name: Ingredient Index
features.description: Pages listing recipes related to a specific ingredient.
user_flows: Navegar a /ingrediente/{ingredient} -> See recipes that include the ingredient
Navegar a /ingrediente/{ingredient} -> Click a listed recipe -> Navigate to /{slug}
Navegar a /ingrediente/{missing-ingredient} -> See 404 or empty results message

features.name: Store (Books Listing)
features.description: Grid of active Amazon books with affiliate CTAs routed per country and affiliate tag appended.
user_flows: Navigate to /tienda -> See grid of is_active books with cover, title and cuisine type
Navigate to /tienda -> Click book card -> Navigate to /tienda/{book}
Navigate to /tienda/{book} -> Click 'Comprar en Amazon' -> Open country-routed Amazon URL with affiliate tag
Navigate to /tienda -> Ensure inactive books (is_active = 0) are not shown

features.name: Book Detail
features.description: Full book page with description and affiliate buy button linked to country-specific Amazon domain and affiliate tag.
user_flows: Navigate to /tienda/{book} -> See book details and affiliate buy button
Navigate to /tienda/{book} -> Click buy button -> Open Amazon URL with affiliate tag and correct country domain
Navigate to /tienda/{invalid-book} -> See 404 page

features.name: Static Pages
features.description: CMS-like static pages (privacy, cookies, about, contact, legal) rendered from the pages table.
user_flows: Navigate to /pagina/{page} -> See page content rendered from DB
Navigate to /pagina/privacidad -> See meta_title and meta_description present
Navigate to /pagina/{unpublished-page} -> See 404 or not published message

features.name: SEO Utilities (Sitemap & Robots)
features.description: Sitemap and robots endpoints for search engine indexing and crawl rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /sitemap.xml -> Receive XML containing published recipes, categories and pages
Navigate to /robots.txt -> Receive robots.txt disallowing /admin and allowing other routes
Navigate to /sitemap.xml when there are no published recipes -> Receive valid XML with available entries

features.name: Admin Login and Dashboard
features.description: Admin authentication and dashboard with stats, latest recipes and quick actions (requires active user and role check).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> See /admin dashboard
Navigate to /admin/login -> Fill wrong password -> Click Login button -> See authentication error on login page
Login as deactivated user -> Attempt to log in at /admin/login -> See error preventing login and redirect to /admin/login

features.name: Recipe CRUD (Admin)
features.description: Create, edit, publish, soft-delete recipes with a 7-tab editor covering basics, ingredients, steps, times, SEO, history and FAQ.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/recetas/crear -> Fill title and description -> Add 3 ingredients -> Add 2 steps -> Set SEO fields -> Toggle is_published ON -> Click Save -> See new recipe in /admin/recetas list
Navigate to /admin/recetas -> Click edit on a recipe -> Navigate to /admin/recetas/{id}/editar -> Modify ingredients order -> Click Save -> See order persisted in DB
Navigate to /admin/recetas -> Click delete on a recipe -> Confirm delete -> See recipe soft-deleted and removed from public listings
Navigate to /admin/recetas/crear -> Submit form with missing required fields -> See validation errors and recipe not created

features.name: AI Recipe Enhancement
features.description: Trigger Anthropic Claude API to propose SEO, story, tips and FAQ improvements and accept selected changes via diff view; rate-limited per user.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/recetas/{id}/editar -> Click 'Mejorar con IA' -> Receive AI JSON results in diff view -> Select fields to accept -> Click 'Guardar cambios' -> See selected fields updated in DB
Navigate to /admin/recetas/{id}/mejorar-ia -> Trigger AI call when user exceeded rate limit -> Receive 429 with retry-after information
Navigate to /admin/recetas/{id}/mejorar-ia when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing on server -> Receive 503 error with user-facing message

features.name: CSV Recipe Import
features.description: Upload CSV to import recipes in batches with progress polling; invalid rows are skipped and reported.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/recetas/importar -> Upload valid CSV -> Background jobs dispatched -> Poll /admin/recetas/importar/progreso/{batchId} -> See progress update until complete -> See valid recipes in /admin/recetas
Navigate to /admin/recetas/importar -> Upload CSV with malformed rows -> Jobs skip invalid rows -> Poll progress -> See error log entries for skipped rows and imported valid rows
Navigate to /admin/recetas/importar -> Upload extremely large CSV exceeding allowed size -> Receive validation error and no jobs dispatched

features.name: Ver receta
features.description: Mostrar una receta individual con ingredientes y pasos
user_interactions: Navegar a la URL de la receta

features.name: Listado de recetas y categorías
features.description: Navegar y filtrar recetas por categoría y subcategoría
user_interactions: Hacer clic en una categoría o subcategoría

features.name: Índice por ingrediente
features.description: Buscar recetas relacionadas con un ingrediente
